title: DevOps & Cloud Engineer
description: Own and evolve the infrastructure that powers CommHawk's client deployments. From Kubernetes clusters to automated CI/CD pipelines, you will ensure reliability, security, and blazing performance at scale.
responsibilities: Design and manage cloud-native infrastructure on AWS / GCP
Automate deployments with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, ArgoCD)
Monitor system health and drive SRE best practices
Collaborate with engineering on security hardening and cost optimisation
requirements: 3+ years in a DevOps / SRE / Platform Engineering role
Hands-on Kubernetes and container orchestration experience
Experience with observability tooling (Grafana, Prometheus, Datadog)
